{{Quote|She came across as a generally good person, although I realize this was long ago. I am not totally convinced she is intentionally disrupting the search for Alliance safe worlds, but we should consider questioning her next time she appears.|[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Lak Sivrak/Legends|Lak Sivrak's]] intelligence report on Yurdak Fav|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Yurdak Fav''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]].

==Biography==
Yurdak Fav was born in the [[Uvena system/Legends|Uvena system]], particularly in [[Inner Uvena]] as could be shown by her bright yellow eyes. She was the youngest of a long family of Republic scouts who could be traced to her great-great-grandmother. Following her steps, Fav served in the [[Republic Survey Corps/Legends|Republic Survey Corps]].<ref name="AIR" />

The declaration of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] led many Shistavanens to leave the Corps. Fav was one of those newly unemployed scouts.<ref name="AIR" />

Sometime before [[11 BBY/Legends|11 BBY]], Fav and [[Lak Sivrak/Legends|Lak Sivrak]] were contacted by the [[Uvena System Constabulary]]. They were asked to search missing [[Alpha Premier]] [[Korta Sarc]], who was eventually found murdered inside the [[Jenet/Legends|Jenet]] embassy. Afterward, Fav and Sivrak spent a time together and with other scouts before returning to their respective warrens. Sivrak kept a good impression on Fav.<ref name="AIR" />

She was then seen following [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] scouts, always with a new ship (including the ''[[Zol-Uvena]]''). As those scouts were looking for potential safeworlds, Fav's presence made them rule out those worlds as unsafe, which eventually led to a dearth of Rebel safeworlds.<ref name="AIR" />

She never attacked any Rebel, and the Rebel Alliance never could proof any Imperial forces in the safeworlds identified by Fav. However, the Alliance considered her a potential threat to be dealt with; and old acquaintance Lak Sivrak wanted to question her.<ref name="AIR" />

The following time she was identified, a team of Rebels tried to meet with her and discuss an agreement. She was captured by slavers, probably the [[Mytaranor Slaving Council]], and the Rebels tried to rescue her due to her knowledge.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
